name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Improved

- Polished agent-facing playbooks for new AI agents working through UniBridge.
- ToolGuide now exposes an agent_playbook workflow with read-before-modify, scope awareness, safe execution, and verification ladder guidance.
- ContextSnapshot agentBrief now includes a compact operatingProtocol and verificationLadder in addition to risk flags, guardrails, and recommended calls.
- DomainCatalog now returns domain-specific riskControls so agents can see what to read before editing, how to execute safely, how to verify, and which red flags matter for that Unity domain.
- Added searchable aliases such as agent_playbook, playbook, read_before_modify, verification_ladder, risk_controls, and operating_protocol.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler Action=Hierarchy exports bounded profiler marker hierarchy/top-sample data for AI performance triage.
- UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=ChangeImpact compares current C# source with ProposedSource or ProposedPath before large edits and reports syntax, API, serialized field, Unity callback, source-delta, and reload risks.
- UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=CodeUsages finds C# source call sites and type/member references before risky API changes.
- UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=MemberUsages finds serialized UnityEvent, AnimationEvent, and serialized field references to a script member.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence and UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence provide bounded YAML reference locations for asset/script GUID usages.
